Premed.Note: Palonosetron 0.5mg/Netupitant 300mg (Akynzeo) p.o. 1h pred chemo, Dexametazón 12mg i.v., Pantoprazol 40mg p.o.

Instructions.Name: gemcitabin
Instructions.Inst: v 500 ml FR i.v. počas 30 min

Instructions.Name: oxaliplatina
Instructions.Inst: v 250 ml 5% GLC i.v. počas 120 min po gemcitabíne

_source: El Gnaoui T et al. Ann Oncol 2007;18:1361; BCCA LYGEMOX
